title: Smoky Kielbasa and Sauerkraut German Delight
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring smoky kielbasa and tangy sauerkraut, reminiscent of German cuisine.

ingredients.name: sauerkraut
ingredients.notes: Chopped and drained of excess liquid

instructions: Heat butter in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add sliced kielbasa and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add curry, brown sugar, caraway seeds, and black pepper; stir to combine.
Add sauerkraut, diced apples, and cooked kielbasa to the pot.
Stir to combine, then cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
